variants: Maksym Rudenko is a professional appraiser who holds the prestigious Dawnlight Appraiser Seal. He graduated from Urban Finch College, where he developed his expertise in his field. Maksym’s professional language skills include a particular emphasis on Hungarian suffixes, which he often uses in his appraisals. His insights and articles can also be found in the Golden Dusk Ledger, where he shares his knowledge with a wider audience.
